title: Set Up Pino Structured Logging in Next.js
summary: Add Pino for high-performance, JSON-structured logging in Next.js API routes, Server Actions, and server components.
declaration: I will set up Pino structured logging for this Next.js project. This covers a shared logger singleton, log levels, pretty-printing in dev, JSON output in production, and child loggers for request-scoped context. If you need browser-side logging too, I'll add pino-browser as well.
